zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多，压力渐显
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格徘徊在1664.32美元附近，接近20日均线1654.69美元，显示短期均线支撑有效。虽然24小时内价格略下跌0.58%，但整体仍保持在均线之上，暗示市场仍偏向多头格局，但涨势动能有限。  

MACD值15.49显示多头动能存在，但信号线未给出明确指示，表明趋势尚未形成强烈突破。缺乏RSI数据限制了超买超卖判断，但从价格区间看，短线可能在1660至1675美元间震荡整理，短期趋势呈现震荡上行特征。  

关键支撑位位于1650美元附近，可作为短线买入参考；阻力位在1675至1680美元区间，若突破则有望开启新一轮上行空间。投资者应关注价格在均线及阻力位附近的反应，避免追高操作。  

交易建议上，短线偏多但需谨慎。可在支撑位附近分批建仓，设置止损在1645美元下方，同时关注高位阻力区域，如突破确认，可考虑加仓，但若价格连续回落至均线以下，应及时减仓或观望，控制风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1664.32, slightly below the session high of 1674.23 and just above the daily low of 1661.15, reflecting a market that remains under modest selling pressure. The 24-hour decline of 0.58% suggests short-term weakness, but price action continues to hold above the 20-period simple moving average at 1654.69. This positioning indicates that the broader near-term trend remains cautiously constructive despite the recent pullback and lack of strong upside momentum.

The moving average structure favors buyers as long as ETH maintains support above the 1655 region. The MACD value of 15.49 remains positive, indicating bullish momentum has not fully disappeared, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on price behavior and MACD. Current conditions point to consolidation rather than a decisive trend reversal, with traders waiting for a catalyst to drive direction.

Key support is located around 1660-1655, corresponding to both the session low and the 20-day moving average area. A break below this zone could expose ETH to further downside toward 1640 and potentially 1625. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near 1675, followed by the psychologically important 1700 level. A sustained move above 1675 would strengthen bullish sentiment and increase the probability of a test of higher resistance levels in coming sessions.

For trading purposes, aggressive buyers may look for entries on pullbacks toward the 1655-1660 support zone while maintaining disciplined risk management below support. More conservative participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 1675 before establishing long exposure. Short-term bearish strategies become more attractive only if ETH closes decisively beneath 1655, signaling weakening trend structure and increasing downside risk. Overall, the market currently favors a neutral-to-slightly-bullish outlook while support remains intact.
